entries.text:
Verse 1

Bethphage

Meaning, house of unripe figs, see Mark 11:12; Mark 11:20. probably so called after the fig tree was cursed.

Verse 10

kingdom

(See Scofield "Matthew 3:2")

Verse 13

leaves

Fig trees which have retained their leaves through the winter usually have figs also. It was still too early for new leaves or fruit.

Verse 19

when even

whenever, i.e. every day when evening came.

Verse 22

Have faith

Have the faith of God; i.e. the faith which God gives. Cf. 1 Corinthians 12:9; Ephesians 2:8.

Verse 23

whosoever

See, Matthew 17:20; Luke 11:1 (See Scofield "Luke 11:1"); Luke 17:6; John 14:13; John 14:14

Verse 26

if ye

(See Scofield "Matthew 6:12"). Mark 12:26 is omitted from the best MSS.
